title: stipa tianschanica var. klemenzii
intro: Stipa tianschanica var. klemenzii, also known as the Klemenz's needle grass or Chinese feather grass, is a type of plant species belonging to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties which include antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Stipa tianschanica var. klemenzii include reducing fever, alleviating joint pain, and promoting digestive health, making it a valuable remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
